description: Code quality improvements: refactor CdkBaseStack.cs for modularity and readability, optimize CdkBaseStackTest.cs to use shared fixtures like EndToEndValidationTest, add XML doc comments, improve naming, add CI coverage reporting, and add a Reflections section to EXPERIMENT.md
steps: In src/CdkBase.Tests/CdkBaseStackTest.cs: Add an IClassFixture pattern (similar to EndToEndValidationFixture in EndToEndValidationTest.cs) to share a single synthesized Template across all 70 tests instead of creating a new App/Stack for each test. Create a CdkBaseStackFixture class with Template and serialized state machine JSON. Update CdkBaseStackTest to implement IClassFixture<CdkBaseStackFixture> and use shared template. Keep the Theory tests that need different environments as separate methods that create their own stacks. This reduces test execution time significantly.

In src/CdkBase/CdkBaseStack.cs: Extract logical sections into private helper methods for readability - e.g. CreateStorageBuckets(), CreateMetadataTable(), CreateStateMachine(), CreateAlarms(), CreateDashboard(). Add XML documentation comments to the class and constructor. Keep it in one file but organize with clear method boundaries and region comments.
In src/CdkBase/PipelineStack.cs: Add XML documentation comments to the class. Add a comment explaining the placeholder connection ARN more clearly.

In .github/workflows/ci.yml: Add a step for collecting test coverage using 'dotnet test' with coverlet. Add '--collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"' to the test step. Add a step to report the coverage summary to the workflow log using ReportGenerator or a simple coverage summary.

In docs/EXPERIMENT.md: Add a new '## Reflections' section at the end (before Related Documentation) covering: (1) what worked well about TDD for CDK infrastructure, (2) challenges with JSII and test performance, (3) benefits of the fixture pattern for test efficiency, (4) observations about AI-assisted development for infrastructure code, (5) lessons learned about state machine testing via string serialization, (6) recommendations for future iterations of this experiment.
In src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/index.py: Add type hints to function signatures for better documentation. No functional changes.
acceptance_criteria: All 129+ C# tests still pass after refactoring (test count may increase slightly if fixtures consolidation changes)
CdkBaseStackTest uses shared fixture pattern - only 1 template synthesis for the majority of tests
CdkBaseStack.cs has clear helper methods with XML doc comments
CI workflow includes coverage collection step
EXPERIMENT.md has a Reflections section with substantive content
cdk synth succeeds for default, dev, and prod environments
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth -c environment=prod
